mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, customer_id, business_id, total_amount, payment_status, accept_status, due_date, created_at) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{businessId}, #{totalAmount}, 'READY', 'PENDING', #{dueDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
